x-sdk-skills.description: Ant Design X SDK core skill package, including complete features such as useXChat, XRequest, and custom Provider
x-sdk-skills.descriptionZh: Ant Design X SDK 核心技能包，包含 useXChat、XRequest 和自定义 Provider 等完整功能

skills.name: use-x-chat
skills.desc: Focus on explaining how to use the useXChat Hook, including custom Provider integration, message management, error handling, multi-conversation management, and more
skills.descZh: 专注讲解如何使用 useXChat Hook，包括自定义 Provider 的集成、消息管理、错误处理、多会话管理等

skills.name: x-card
skills.desc: Use when building AI-driven UIs with @ant-design/x-card — covers XCard.Box, XCard.Card, A2UI v0.9 commands, data binding, catalogs, actions, and streaming patterns.
skills.descZh: 当需要用 @ant-design/x-card 让 AI Agent 动态渲染富交互 UI 时使用——涵盖 XCard.Box、XCard.Card、A2UI v0.9 命令、数据绑定、Catalog、Actions 和流式渲染模式。

skills.name: x-chat-provider
skills.desc: Focus on implementing custom Chat Provider, helping to adapt any streaming interface to Ant Design X standard format
skills.descZh: 专注于自定义 Chat Provider 的实现，帮助将任意流式接口适配为 Ant Design X 标准格式

skills.name: x-request
skills.desc: Focus on explaining the practical configuration and usage of XRequest, providing accurate configuration instructions based on official documentation
skills.descZh: 专注讲解 XRequest 的实际配置和使用，基于官方文档提供准确的配置说明

x-components.description: Ant Design X UI component skill package, covering all components: Bubble, Sender, Conversations, Prompts, ThoughtChain, Actions, Welcome, Attachments, Sources, Suggestion, Think, FileCard, CodeHighlighter, Mermaid, XProvider, and Notification
x-components.descriptionZh: Ant Design X UI 组件技能包，覆盖所有组件的使用指南：Bubble、Sender、Conversations、Prompts、ThoughtChain、Actions、Welcome、Attachments、Sources、Suggestion、Think、FileCard、CodeHighlighter、Mermaid、XProvider 和 Notification

skills.name: x-components
skills.desc: Use when building AI chat UIs with @ant-design/x components — covers Bubble, Sender, Conversations, Prompts, ThoughtChain, Actions, Welcome, Attachments, Sources, Suggestion, Think, FileCard, CodeHighlighter, Mermaid, Folder, XProvider, and Notification.
skills.descZh: 使用 @ant-design/x 组件库构建 AI 对话 UI 时使用 —— 涵盖 Bubble、Sender、Conversations、Prompts、ThoughtChain、Actions、Welcome、Attachments、Sources、Suggestion、Think、FileCard、CodeHighlighter、Mermaid、Folder、XProvider 和 Notification。

x-markdown.description: Ant Design X Markdown rendering skill package, providing rich text rendering and chat enhancement features
x-markdown.descriptionZh: Ant Design X Markdown 渲染技能包，提供富文本渲染和对话增强功能

skills.name: x-markdown
skills.desc: Use when building or reviewing Markdown rendering with @ant-design/x-markdown, including streaming Markdown, custom component mapping, plugins, themes, and chat-oriented rich content.
skills.descZh: 当任务涉及 @ant-design/x-markdown 的 Markdown 渲染、流式输出、自定义组件映射、插件、主题或聊天富内容展示时使用。
